description: Composition Brown shorts, has two side pockets, two patch pockets at the back with flaps and press buttoned closures, stitch detailing, two patch pockets with flaps and press buttoned closures on the sides, buttoned and zipped closure and loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations His cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little boy in these shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
